name: Auth0
description: Auth0 Management API for managing users, roles, connections, organizations, and applications in your Auth0 tenant. Create and search users, assign roles, configure identity providers, and monitor authentication logs programmatically.

auth.note: Replace YOUR_DOMAIN with your Auth0 tenant domain. Obtain a Management API access token via client credentials grant.

capabilities.name: users_list
capabilities.description: Search and list users with Lucene query filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: users_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user in a database connection.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user's full profile by their user ID.

capabilities.name: users_update
capabilities.description: Update a user's profile, password, metadata, or blocked status.

capabilities.name: users_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a user.

capabilities.name: users_get_roles
capabilities.description: List all roles assigned to a specific user.

capabilities.name: users_assign_roles
capabilities.description: Assign one or more roles to a user.

capabilities.name: users_remove_roles
capabilities.description: Remove one or more roles from a user.

capabilities.name: roles_list
capabilities.description: List all roles defined in your tenant.

capabilities.name: roles_create
capabilities.description: Create a new role for RBAC access control.

capabilities.name: roles_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific role by its ID.

capabilities.name: roles_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a role by its ID.

capabilities.name: roles_list_permissions
capabilities.description: List all permissions associated with a role.

capabilities.name: connections_list
capabilities.description: List all identity provider connections.

capabilities.name: connections_create
capabilities.description: Create a new identity provider connection.

capabilities.name: connections_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific connection.

capabilities.name: connections_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a connection and all its users.

capabilities.name: clients_list
capabilities.description: List all applications registered in your tenant.

capabilities.name: clients_create
capabilities.description: Register a new application.

capabilities.name: logs_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve authentication and management event logs for auditing.

capabilities.name: logs_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single log event by its ID.

capabilities.name: organizations_list
capabilities.description: List all organizations for B2B multi-tenant scenarios.

capabilities.name: organizations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new organization.

capabilities.name: organizations_add_members
capabilities.description: Add users as members to an organization.

capabilities.name: resource_servers_list
capabilities.description: List all API resource servers.

capabilities.name: resource_servers_create
capabilities.description: Register a new API resource server with scopes.

capabilities.name: tenant_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve tenant settings and configuration.

capabilities.name: stats_get_active_users
capabilities.description: Get the count of active users in the last 30 days.

capabilities.name: jobs_users_export
capabilities.description: Create a bulk user export job.

capabilities.name: jobs_get
capabilities.description: Check the status of a background job.
